This exotic indoor strain blends Bubba Kush x Animal Mints , creating dense, frosty buds with an earthy sweetness and that signature minty finish. Expect a balanced high that starts with a clear, uplifting spark before easing into full-body calm — perfect for winding down without slowing all the way down. Flavor, aroma, and design all come together in one refreshingly elevated experience. ◆ Bubba Kush x Animal Mints ◆ Indica-Dominant Hybrid ◆ Premium Indoor Flower Hand-trimmed, slow-cured, and crafted with Hello Mary’s signature standards — good mood, minted up. MJ Mints THCa Premium Flower MJ Mints, a slightly indica-dominant hybrid from Bubba Kush x Animal Mints, delivers a chill, happy high that relaxes your body while keeping your mind clear and engaged. Sweet, skunky flavors meet a crisp, minty exhale with savory herbal undertones, making each puff rich and satisfying. Fluffy forest green buds flecked with golden hairs and sparkling trichomes complete this smooth, tingly experience — perfect for stress relief, mood boost, or unwinding after a long day.
